name: Gary Carmine
description:
He needs help after the DB pod hit his turret and it sent him back

Alternate version where Gary Carmine lives

(I never played Gears of War, I was just watching my brother playing the game and I saw this one character that I thought looked cool, but got sad has he died from the DB pod, and I wanted to find a bit of him on here, but there was none, so I made my own. Tell me if there’s anything that I should write differently for this character.)
creator: Beepbird
